blocks.wolfram_input: HoldForm[TZPIDWolframRepresentation["ID0947", 1, <|"kind" -> "symbolic_token_index", "title" -> "HIGH-MU FERRITE CORE COMPOSITION \\& SATURATION LIMITS", "latex" -> "M_B = \\rho_{\\text{vac}} \\cdot \\mathcal{V}_D \\cdot \\left( 1 - \\frac{\\alpha_T}{\\chi_T} \\right) \\equiv \\oint_{\\partial \\Omega} \\frac{P_{\\text{vac}}}{g_{\\text{eff}}} \\cdot \\hat{\\mathbf{n}} \\, dA", "numericAtoms" -> {1}, "symbolicTokens" -> {"rho", "alpha", "chi", "equiv", "oint", "partial", "Omega", "hat", "mathbf", "M", "B", "D", "T", "P", "g", "dA"}, "candidateWolframInput" -> "", "candidateMethod" -> "contains_text_or_markup"|>]]
